case_title: GORFKLE, KENNETH VS GURWITZ, MICHAEL C/O IDS FINANCIAL SERVICES et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GORFKLE, KENNETH AS TO DEFENDANT GURWITZ, MICHAEL C/O IDS FINANCIAL SERVICES HADERER, JUDITH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-31-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GORFKLE, KENNETH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GURWITZ, MICHAEL C/O IDS FINANCIAL SERVICES HADERER, JUDITH $3,893.55 PRINCIPAL, $35.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,928.55, $3600 ON NOTE AND $293.55 PHONE AND WATER BILLS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT GURWITZ, MICHAEL C/O IDS FINANCIAL SERVICES HEARING SET FOR JUL-11-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
DEFT. REQUESTED COTINAUNCE ON MOTION FOR TIMEPA- YMENT RESERVED FOR JULY 12, 94 AT 8:00 AM. WAITING FOR JUDGE SINATURE.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS OF JUL-12-1994, GRANTED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GURWITZ, MICHAEL C/O IDS FINANCIAL SERVICES
CONT' ON TIME PAYMENT GRANTED. HEARING SET FOR JULY 12, 1994 AT 8:00AM PER DEPT. 6 ON FRI. 8TH OF JULY AT 4:00PM. NO ORIGINAL ORDER UNTIL 7/11/94.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS CONTINUED FROM JUL-11-1994 TO JUL-12-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
